THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: STUART DAVIDSON'S UNOPPOSED PRO HAC VICE APPLICATION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING: AN ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff ANTHONY MORRIS's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Stuart Davidson's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing: an order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff ANTHONY MORRIS's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Christopher Chad Johnson's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing: an order is signed. (See scanned order for details)
